title: narcissus verbanensis
intro: Narcissus verbanensis, also known as Spring Squill, is a perennial bulbous plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its alkaloid content, which has been shown to have antiseptic, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Narcissus verbanensis include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its use as a diuretic to help reduce fluid retention. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make tinctures, teas, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
